response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and excellent communication skills, they fundamentally lack the two mandatory requirements: only ~6 months of professional C++ experience (role requires 5–10 years) and zero exposure to capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains. These are critical gaps that cannot be bridged in a consulting engagement, particularly on a mid-senior level role where deep domain knowledge is essential.
strengths: Excellent communication and teaching background with multiple workshops and talks on software architecture and testing
Strong CI/CD and DevOps infrastructure experience (GitLab, CI servers, Docker, Artifactory)
Software craftsmanship mindset demonstrated through TDD, code quality focus, and mentoring across multiple roles
concerns: Severe C++ experience gap: only ~6 months demonstrated (National Instruments) versus 5–10 years required for mid-senior level
Complete absence of financial services, capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income domain knowledge—a mandatory requirement
Primary expertise is modern web/backend stacks (Node.js, TypeScript, React) and Linux; no Windows C++ platform experience evident
